calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-10-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Petitioner: Richard Frantz Cochrane Jr., present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Chloe Marie Cochrane and the Gender is changed from MALE to FEMALE.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-26-2005 Reset To May-10-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ann Mendoza.
Petitioner: Richard Frantz Cochrane, Jr., present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections were made at the hearing.
Lacks the legal document from the medical provider, the matter is continued to May 10, 2005 at 9:00 A.M.
